name: Synapse X Exam Lab
subtitle: Repository-hosted NEUR3301 command centre
description: Exact 2026 lecture sequence, browser-local progress, mechanism-heavy MCQs, corrected Glia I recall, JSON backup and a misconception ledger. No account or API key.

name: Full Synapse Suite
subtitle: Extended browser study system
description: The larger hosted system with diagrams, broader question banks, long-answer maps and spaced-repetition support while its maintainable source is consolidated.

name: MDMA Seminar Studio
subtitle: Evidence-hardened 15-minute workspace
description: Timed slides, speaker handoffs, evidence boundaries, regulatory caveats, rehearsal controls and hostile Q&A prompts.

name: Study Playbook
subtitle: Weekly marks-first operating system
description: Lecture compression, closed-book retrieval, intervention prediction, MCQ error logging and final-exam answer construction.
